title: Retry Storm After Upstream Timeout

payload.log_text:

May 13 05:21:03 ubuntu-prod api[991]: retry attempt=3 route=/checkout status=504
May 13 05:21:04 ubuntu-prod api[991]: circuit breaker open for payment-service

chat_prompt: Explain how the retry storm amplified the outage.
